Ex Parte Application For Right To Attach Order And For Issuanc Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Mar-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Robert F. Cohen, for Plaintiff and moving party: Creditors Trade association, Inc.

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s Ex Parte Application For Right To Attach Order And For Issuanc Of Writ Of Attachment is granted in the amount of $5,278.70. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000. Order signed in open court. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
